arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the SSM Incidents replication set.

created_by.description: The identifier of the user or service that created the replication set.

deletion_protected.description: Indicates whether the replication set is protected from deletion.

id.description: The unique identifier of the SSM Incidents replication set.

last_modified_by.description: The identifier of the user or service that last modified the replication set.

region.description: The set of regions where the replication set is deployed, including details like KMS key ARN, name, status, and status message.

status.description: The current status of the SSM Incidents replication set.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the SSM Incidents replication set.
